attack_note: Attack 1: MV 001 maliciously turned on; reflected on 1LT001 and 1FIT001
Attack 2: 1 FIT 001 false/off reading
Attacks 3-4: drain elevated reservoir 2 LT 002 and change 1 AIT 001 reading
Attack 5: turn off valves to consumers
Attack 6: turn on 2 MCV 101 and 2 MCV 201
Attack 7: set 1 AIT 002 and open 2 MV 003
Attack 8: open 2 MCV 007; reflected in 2PIT002 and 2FT002
Attack 9: turn on 1 P 006 maliciously
Attack 10: damage 1 MV 001 and raw water pump; pump tag unspecified in the PDF
Attack 11: similar to attack 8
Attack 12: similar to attack 8
Attack 15: stealthy attack, inverse of attack 3
